heading: Brookvale vs Brooms Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brookvale, New South Wales and Brooms Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brooms Head has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Brookvale (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brookvale or Brooms Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brookvale has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Brooms Head scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brookvale scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Brooms Head scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brookvale or Brooms Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brooms Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
